description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and test using the docker:latest image and docker:dind service for Docker jobs and a centos image with a redis service for a non‑Docker build. In the build stage define build-example-1 and build-example-2 jobs that each run docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN ${DOCKER_TAG}, docker build -t ${CONTAINER_BUILD_IMAGE} -f ${APP_DIRECTORY}/Dockerfile . and docker push ${CONTAINER_BUILD_IMAGE}, using tags dind and variables APP_DIRECTORY (example-1 or example-2) and CONTAINER_BUILD_IMAGE (${DOCKER_TAG}:${APP_DIRECTORY}). Also in the build stage add non-dockerized-build-and-test-example-2 that runs on centos, installs python-devel and python-virtualenv via yum, creates and activates a virtualenv, upgrades pip, cd into example-2, installs requirements.txt, prints env and runs pytest, with a redis service. In the test stage define test-example-1 that runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN ${DOCKER_TAG}, docker pull ${CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE}, docker run ${CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE} pytest, using tags dind and variable CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE=${DOCKER_TAG}:example-1. Define test-example-2 that runs docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN ${DOCKER_TAG}, starts a redis container named redis-${CI_BUILD_ID}, pulls ${CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE}, and runs it linked to the redis container with pytest, also using tags dind and variable CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE=${DOCKER_TAG}:example-2; no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are defined.
